goal: Show attack surface breakdown by OS/software stack, business unit, and environment

marts.sql: CREATE TABLE attack_surface_summary_by_os_software AS SELECT a.business_unit, a.environment, a.os, a.software_stack, COUNT(DISTINCT a.asset_id) AS total_assets, COUNT(DISTINCT v.vulnerability_id) AS total_vulnerabilities, COUNT(DISTINCT m misconfiguration_id) AS total_misconfigurations FROM assets a LEFT JOIN vulnerabilities v ON a.asset_id = v.asset_id LEFT JOIN misconfigurations m ON a.asset_id = m.asset_id GROUP BY a.business_unit, a.environment, a.os, a.software_stack;
marts.description: This mart contains a summary of the attack surface categorized by operating system, software stack, business unit, and environment.
marts.natural_language_question: What is the breakdown of the attack surface by OS/software stack, business unit, and environment?
marts.business_value: This mart helps in understanding the distribution of assets and their vulnerabilities, enabling better resource allocation and risk management.
marts.grain: One row per combination of business unit, environment, OS, and software stack.

marts.sql: CREATE TABLE external_exposure_summary AS SELECT e.business_unit, e.environment, e.exposure_type, COUNT(DISTINCT e.exposure_id) AS total_exposures FROM external_exposure e GROUP BY e.business_unit, e.environment, e.exposure_type;
marts.description: This mart summarizes external exposures categorized by business unit, environment, and type of exposure.
marts.natural_language_question: What are the total external exposures categorized by business unit and environment?
marts.business_value: This mart provides insights into external risks, aiding in compliance and risk management strategies.
marts.grain: One row per combination of business unit, environment, and exposure type.

marts.sql: CREATE TABLE identity_exposure_summary AS SELECT i.business_unit, i.environment, COUNT(DISTINCT i.identity_exposure_id) AS total_identity_exposures FROM identity_exposure i GROUP BY i.business_unit, i.environment;
marts.description: This mart summarizes identity exposures by business unit and environment.
marts.natural_language_question: How many identity exposures are there by business unit and environment?
marts.business_value: This mart helps in monitoring sensitive identity information exposure, ensuring compliance and enhancing data security measures.
marts.grain: One row per combination of business unit and environment.
